push_constant_note: 48-byte / 12-dword RURIX-DEFINED layout for the RD-native container variant (patch 0046): the 6 frustum planes are NOT root constants here — they moved to the frustum_planes StructuredBuffer<float4> at register t1 so b0 shrinks from 144 bytes (the shim variant, rejected by generate_rd_container.py as push_constant_too_large) to 48 bytes and fits the RD/D3D12 128-byte 32-bit-root-constant window (rendering_device.cpp:6101). command_stride_dwords == 5 mirrors INDIRECT_MULTIMESH_COMMAND_STRIDE (mesh_storage.h L63) and instance_count_dword_index == 1 mirrors the +sizeof(uint32_t) byte offset of the CPU count write (mesh_storage.cpp L2210); both are carried as parameters, not hardcoded.

grx015_mapping.requires_64bit_integer_shader_capability: gpu_culling carries no i64 push-constant fields (planes are an f32x4 StructuredBuffer, sphere is f32, parameters are u32), so the SHADER_INT64 device capability is NOT part of its binding preflight (same as GRX-013/014).
grx015_mapping.frustum_planes_srv_note: 6 normalized inward-facing planes (nx, ny, nz, d) as a StructuredBuffer<float4> at register t1 (96 bytes); the module buffer_update's it per frame from the render camera BEFORE compute_list_begin (n_rurix = -normal, d_rurix = plane.d — the Godot Plane sign-negation red line).
grx015_mapping.transform_layout_note: row-major 3x4 float lanes per 3D instance (mesh_storage.cpp _multimesh_instance_set_transform L1880-1915): lanes 0-3 = (basis.rows[0], origin.x), 4-7 = (rows[1], origin.y), 8-11 = (rows[2], origin.z)
grx015_mapping.command_write_note: count-only: InterlockedAdd(+1) per visible instance into EACH surface's instance-count dword (the dword the CPU writes at mesh_storage.cpp L2210); all other command dwords untouched; count dwords + visibility bitmask zeroed pre-dispatch via RD::buffer_clear BEFORE compute_list_begin
grx015_mapping.visibility_bitmask_note: u32[ceil(instance_count/32)], bit (i & 31) of word (i >> 5) = instance i visible, InterlockedOr writes, zeroed pre-dispatch; the GRX-016/018 shared input interface
grx015_mapping.dispatch_note: one thread per instance; local 64x1x1; dispatch (ceil(instance_count / 64), 1, 1)
